title: Put-Call Parity: Explain the significance of the put-call parity relationship in options...
summary: Analyze put option properties, pricing, or payoff structure.
prompt: Explain the significance of the put-call parity relationship in options pricing.
answer_text: Links European call and put prices to prevent arbitrage
solution: Put-call parity is a key concept in options pricing that establishes a relationship between the prices of European call and put options with the same strike price and expiration date. This relationship ensures that arbitrage opportunities do not exist in efficient markets. [[29]]
